references.name: SWE-bench
evidence_reviewed: Repository overview describing real-world GitHub issues against a codebase
Docker-based reproducible evaluation and SWE-bench Lite evaluation workflow
ideas_adapted: Issue-style prompts against fixed repository states
Binary resolution only when all required tests pass

references.name: Terminal-Bench
evidence_reviewed: Task contract: natural-language instruction, verifier script, and oracle solution
Public task gallery with difficulty labels and end-to-end examples such as blind maze mapping and initramfs construction
ideas_adapted: End-to-end tasks in real terminal environments
A verifier script and an oracle concept per task

references.name: tau-bench
evidence_reviewed: Database end-state comparison after dynamic user-agent interactions
pass^k reliability metric over repeated trials
ideas_adapted: Final state rather than conversational appearance
Trajectory fault assignment and fault type labels

references.name: AgentBench
evidence_reviewed: Containerized function-calling tasks spanning operating systems, databases, knowledge graphs, and web shopping
Separation between environment workers and the agent controller
ideas_adapted: Separate environment workers and agent controller

references.name: GAIA
evidence_reviewed: Real-world questions combining reasoning and external capabilities
Tasks designed to be conceptually simple for humans but difficult for assistants
ideas_adapted: Multi-step reasoning combined with tool use

references.name: G-Eval
ideas_adapted: Explicit caution about evaluator model bias
